notes:
Runs out of the box, detects controller (DS4), as many games that runs over wine/proton has problems when minimizes or lose focus, try to avoid fullscreen, with a good window manager (like Kwin) that can remove decorations can mimic "borderless fullscreen" using windowed in game. 
I feel a little input lag, nothing annoying with mouse.
IDK if this is an issue, but game detects or mouse or controller but not both, if you want to change, you need to restart the game (gameplay control).
I play first campaign with no issue.
title: Earth Defense Force: Insect Armageddon

notes: Runs as good as the wondows-version, including controller..
title: Earth Defense Force: Insect Armageddon
